---
name: Infra / Deployment
about: Infrastructure work such as Docker, CI/CD, server configuration
title: "[Infra] "
labels: Infra
assignees: ""
---

### Target of Change
> Specify what's changing — Docker, CI/CD, nginx, environment variables, etc.

### Reason for Change
> Why is this change needed?

### Scope of Impact
> Which services, containers, or environments does this affect?

### Rollback Plan
> How to revert if something goes wrong.

### Checklist
- [ ] Verified in the staging environment
- [ ] Shared with the team
